test_not_tautological.reason: A stub poll.sh (e.g., just 'exit 0') would not call 'gh agent-task view' with the session ID, so test_poll_session_id_polling would fail (it asserts 'agent-task view' in calls and 'test-sess-abc123' in calls). The original unmodified poll.sh would fail test_poll_no_timeline_api because it calls the timeline API. These tests cannot be satisfied without implementing the actual fix.
